notes:
Multifunction Device - Color Printer/Scaner/Copier

For basic printing functionality use the HPIJS driver . For advanced functionality such as printer status, maintenance features, scanning and photo card unload use the HPLIP driver (which includes HPIJS).

Works also fairly well with the "pcl3" or "cdj550" printer drivers.

Obsolete; HP refers people to the OfficeJet G55.

Consumables/Refills: Seperate Black and Color Cartridges
